I’m playing around with pairing skills with CLIs with file formats that can be linted.  

Started with modelith.sh and now building some stuff around excalidraw authoring. That stuff isn’t public yet.

One thing that is interesting - TOON (or inspired by) instead of JSON. Minimize context bloat.
